# ~~getServerInfoValue()~~

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function getServerInfoValue(server: McpServer, key: "name" | "version"): string;
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/mcp-server-introspection.utility.ts:147](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/mcp-server-introspection.utility.ts#L147)

Reads a server info field (`name` or `version`) from the internal
MCP server state via reflection.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type                                                                  | Description                                                                                     |
| --------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `server`  | [`McpServer`](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk) | The [McpServer](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk) instance to introspect. |
| `key`     | `"name"` \| `"version"`                                               | The server info field to read (`"name"` or `"version"`).                                        |

## Returns

`string`

The field value as a string.

## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  Use `initialize`
response `serverInfo` via the MCP protocol instead.

## Remarks

Traverses `server.server._serverInfo[key]` using
[Reflect.get](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference) and [getStringProperty](../../reflect.utility/functions/getStringProperty.md).  Throws when
the field is unavailable so tests fail loudly rather than
silently passing with `undefined`.

## Throws

If the field is unavailable.
